DEFENSE COUNSEL APPEARED AND WITHDREW HIS MOTION TO CONTINUE. HE REPRESENTED THAT THE CASE SETTLED AND REQUESTED THAT THE TRIAL DATE BE VACATED. THE COURT VACATED THE TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATES. THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF A CRC 225 HEARING. JUDGE DAVID BALLATI; CLERKS: D. HAKEWILL/DANA OKAZAKI; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE (D206)
